CLAUSE.NAME: Collection_LetterToPresenter_Remarks
CLAUSE.value: • Please quote our reference in all your correspondence. • Do not hesitate to contact us in case any queries. • Please note that any instructions to protest for non-payment/non acceptance will only be followed upon your explicit request and confirmation by authenticated SWIFT to this effect and your undertaking to pay all costs/expenses arising us thereof, notwithstanding any collection instruction concerning charges to the contrary. • Please note that any instructions to protest for non-acceptance will only be followed upon your explicit request and confirmation by authenticated SWIFT to pay all costs arising us thereof.
